Our Services

Professional garage door repair solutions for every need

Garage Door Spring Repair

Expert repair and replacement of broken or worn garage door springs.

Learn More →

Garage Door Opener Repair

Troubleshooting and repair for all types of garage door openers.

Learn More →

Garage Door Cable Repair

Expert repair and replacement of frayed or broken garage door cables.

Learn More →

Garage Door Panel Replacement

Replace damaged or dented garage door panels to restore your door's appearance.

Learn More →

New Garage Door Installation

Professional installation of new garage doors from leading brands.

Learn More →

Garage Door Maintenance

Preventative maintenance to keep your garage door operating smoothly and safely.

Learn More →

Off-Track Garage Door Repair

Expert service to realign garage doors that have come off their tracks.

Learn More →
Kozmo Garage Door Repair

Trusted garage door repair professionals serving Charlotte, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
